notes: Single self-contained HTML, Three.js 0.160 via ES module CDN. Scene: foggy graveyard with full moon, halo sprite, starfield (400 points), tombstone ring, dead trees, displaced ground plane, glowing stage disc + ring. Lighting: moonlight key (PCFSoft shadows, 2048 shadow map), warm rim, purple backlight, four orange/purple Halloween spotlights. Post: ACES Filmic tone mapping, UnrealBloom pass, FXAA pass, CSS vignette, animated film-grain canvas. Characters: stylized low-poly humanoids (Michael — black suit + red jacket + fedora + sunglasses + white socks; Pepe — green frog head + bulging eyes + wide mouth; Donald — navy suit + red tie + blonde combover; Elon — leather jacket + receding hairline) + 8 backup zombies. Choreography: 32-second loop with 7 poses (Idle → Zombie Stomp → Shuffle R → Shuffle L → Arms-Up Lunge → Claw Hands → Settle-Bow), procedural per-character offset, leg/torso/head/arm rotations + slight vertical bob. Fog particles (800 additive points) drift upward. UI: Play/Pause, 4 camera modes (Front / Orbit / Low / Crane), Fog toggle, Spotlights toggle, full window resize handling.
